creator: gilham@csl.sri.com
text:
When /etc/malloc.conf is linked to AJ (as requested for
	testing purposes) then AMD gets a signal 11 whenever I try to log in.
	Removing /etc/malloc.conf causes AMD to function normally.  I was
	unable to track the problem down to mounting a specific remote file
	system.

Fix: 

(N/A)
How-To-Repeat: 
	(See description).
